title: Project Manager (m/f/d)
description:
**Discover your exciting role**
 As a project manager (m/f/d) at Exyte, you will take the lead in delivering high‑tech data center projects from planning to handover. You’ll drive budgets, schedules, and quality targets, ensure strict EHS compliance, and coordinate our network of partners and contractors. As the main contact for clients and suppliers, you provide clear performance reporting and keep projects on track by guiding cross‑functional teams and proactively resolving challenges.
   

  

**Explore Your Tasks And Responsibilities**
* Lead the planning, execution, and successful delivery of data center construction projects
* Own and manage project budgets, timelines, and quality benchmarks
* Ensure full compliance with Environmental, Health, and Safety (EHS) regulations
* Coordinate and oversee external planning partners, contractors, and suppliers
* Prepare and present monthly performance reports covering all project dimensions
* Serve as the primary point of contact for clients, suppliers, and subcontractors
* Conduct regular project reviews to track progress and proactively resolve issues
* Inspire and guide cross\\-functional teams to meet project goals and deadlines


**Show Your Expertise**
* Degree in Construction Management, Engineering, or a related field
* Demonstrated experience in project management with a focus on Data Centers or other large\\-scale projects
* Proven experience delivering complex industrial construction projects, ideally within high\\-tech, data center, or semiconductor sector
* Strong technical understanding of Electrical, Mechanical, and CSA components
* Fluent in English (written and spoken) and very good German skills
* Demonstrated success in leading projects to completion
* Excellent communication, leadership, and presentation skills


**Contact**
 You want to be part of the Exyte team? We look forward to receiving your application!
   

  

 For further questions and information, please do not hesitate to contact Lisa Kussmaul via E\\-Mail at lisamarie.kussmaul@exyte.net.
   

  

 Please note that we only consider applications submitted through our application portal. Applications sent via email will not be considered due to data protection regulations.

title: Project Manager
description:
At Westinghouse Electric Company, we are pioneers in nuclear technology and our technology is the basis for nearly half of the world's commercial nuclear power plants in operation. Today, we are also building several new reactors that contribute to more fossil\\-free energy. Globally, we have over 10,000 employees in 19 countries, of which 1,000 are at our Swedish workplaces in Västerås and Täby. Our Swedish operations were founded in 1969 and supply nuclear fuel as well as products and services in automation, maintenance, testing and decommissioning for customers around the world. Read more about us www.westinghousenuclear.com .
   

  

 Project Manager – Environmental Solutions (D\\&D Projects)
   

  

**Westinghouse Electric Company** 
**Mannheim**
**Welcome to the future of nuclear energy** 
 , where Westinghouse Electric Company is leading the field with expertise and innovation to shape the power of tomorrow.
   

  

 At Westinghouse, innovation is in our DNA. We are creative. We think differently. We reimagine the possible across the nuclear industry every day.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Project Manager you will lead major D\\&D projects in Germany, with budgets ranging from €25M to €120M. This position involves managing cross\\-functional teams of 10–30 professionals, including technical experts, site operations, and back\\-office functions (project controls, administration, procurement). You will ensure projects are delivered safely, on time, and within budget in a highly regulated environment.
   

  

 You will report to the Project Director and be located at Mannheim.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead all aspects of project execution: scope, schedule, cost, risk, procurement, quality, resources, and stakeholder engagement.
* Develop and maintain project management plans, baselines, and risk registers.
* Manage multidisciplinary teams in a matrix environment; foster collaboration and accountability.
* Oversee financial performance, forecasting, and reporting.
* Maintain strong relationships with clients, regulators, and internal stakeholders.
* Ensure compliance with safety, environmental, and regulatory requirements.
* Drive continuous improvement and lessons learned.


**Qualifications:**
* Education: Bachelor’s degree in Project Management, Engineering, Business, or related field. Preferred: Advanced degree.
* Experience: 5–10 years of project management experience in technical industries; proven track record managing large, complex projects (€25M–€120M).
* Certifications: PMI PMP or equivalent preferred.
* Languages: Fluent English and German required; Spanish, French, or Italian is a plus.
* Technical Skills: Advanced knowledge of scheduling and cost management tools (Primavera/MSP, SAP); proficiency in MS Office and data visualization tools; familiarity with risk management tools.
* Soft Skills: Strong leadership, strategic thinking, communication, and negotiation abilities.


**Why Westinghouse?**
 We know that to put forth your best effort, you need to be challenged and enjoy what you do in a supportive and respectful environment. We aim to maintain this balance by offering our employees the amenities, benefits and training they need to reach personal and professional goals.
   

  

**Below is an example of what employees in Germany can expect:** 
  

  

* Great benefits for your convenience and safety
+ Employee Assistance Program: confidential counseling and resources for employees, eligible dependents, and household members
+ Peer\\-to\\-peer recognition program.
+ Learning and development opportunities.

* We encourage our employees to participate in community service events and other team\\-building activities to strengthen their bonds and inspire each other.


**You can learn more about Westinghouse by visiting** 
 http://www.westinghousenuclear.com .
   

  

 Westinghouse is an Equal Opportunity Employer including Veterans and Individuals with Disabilities.

As a member of our team, you will work together with engaged colleagues and be a part of an environment that is both challenging and supportive. Many of our positions are based in activity\\-based environments which enables a flexible workplace.
   

  

 At Westinghouse, we have a strong safety culture.
   

  

 Westinghouse is an employer that treats everyone equally.

title: Project Manager (f/m/d) - Root Cause Analysis
description:
**A Snapshot of Your Day**
 Are you passionate about analyzing problems and making a real impact fleet issue resolution of our Gas Service products?
   

  

 Join our Gas Services Operational Excellence team as a Project Manager Root Cause Analysis (f/m/d).
   

  

 In this role, you will play a key part in driving teams to identify root causes for technical challenges. Working closely with cross\\-functional and international teams, you will lead systematic root cause analysis. Ideally, you already bring experience with methods such as Kepner\\-Tregoe, Apollo, Fishbone analysis —or you are eager to expand your expertise with the support of our experienced team of experts.
   

  

**How You’ll Make An Impact**
* Lead and drive Root Cause Analysis (RCA) investigations on time, ensuring holistic view, working closely with cross\\-functional teams to set the basis for solving challenging technical issues sustainably.
* Apply structured problem\\-solving methodologies (e.g., Kepner\\-Tregoe, Apollo) to identify, analyze, and validate root causes.
* Facilitate workshops and RCA sessions, creating an environment where teams collaborate effectively, stay focused, and achieve results.
* As part of our RCA Resource pool, share your expertise by mentoring and coaching colleagues, actively contributing to increasing our RCA Resource pool.
* PM Skill, documentation, planning, oversight…. Communication to stakeholders and customers to present status and results.


**What You Bring**
* Bachelor's degree in engineering; 5\\+ years of experience
* High level of ownership with a proactive drive to lead end\\-to\\-end the root cause analysis
* Strong critical thinking and analytical capabilities to identify true root causes by guiding cross\\-functional teams
* Project management skills \\- Structured working style with solid planning, documentation, and application of methodologies
* Ability to engage and facilitate cross\\-functional teams, ensuring active contribution, alignment, and accountability throughout the RCA process
* Continuous learning mindset combined with strong facilitation and coaching skills to build organizational capability in structured problem solving


**About The Team**
 Our Gas Services division offers Low\\-emission power generation through service and decarbonization. Zero or low emission power generation and all gas turbines under one roof, steam turbines and generators. Decarbonization opportunities through service offerings, modernization, and digitalization of the fleet.
   

  

**Who is Siemens Energy?**
 At Siemens Energy, we are more than just an energy technology company. With \\~100,000 dedicated employees in more than 90 countries, we develop the energy systems of the future, ensuring that the growing energy demand of the global community is met reliably and sustainably. The technologies created in our research departments and factories drive the energy transition and provide the base for one sixth of the world's electricity generation. Our global team is committed to making sustainable, reliable, and affordable energy a reality by pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We uphold a 150\\-year legacy of innovation that encourages our search for people who will support our focus on decarbonization, new technologies, and energy transformation. Find out how you can make a difference at Siemens Energy: https://www.siemens\\-energy.com/employeevideo
   

  

**Rewards/Benefits**
* In addition to an attractive remuneration package in line with the market, you can expect an attractive employer\\-financed company pension scheme
* We also offer the opportunity to become a Siemens Energy shareholder
* We offer our employees the opportunity to work flexibly and remotely, and our inspiring offices provide space for collaboration and creativity
* The professional and personal development of our employees is very important to us. We provide them with the opportunities to learn and develop in a self\\-determined way, various attractive programmes and learning materials are available for this purpose
* In relation to the "compatibility of family and work", we have a wide range of offers, e.g. flexible working time models, childcare places at many locations, the possibility of trial part\\-time work or even a sabbatical


**Jobs \\& Careers:** 
 https://jobs.siemens\\-energy.com/jobs

title: Project Manager Tracker (all genders)
description:
Job Introduction
   

  

 Even though we maintain our feet on the ground, our second home will always remain in the sky. As a medium\\-sized IT company situated in Karlsruhe Germany, developing tailored solutions for global air traffic control authorities is our forte. Our contribution to Flight security, can be found in our systems that operate at various flight control centres and airports, located in more than 80 countries of the world. FREQUENTIS COMSOFT is part of the successful Frequentis group, situated in Vienna, Austria. More information about us on our Youtube Channel.
   

  

 So, are you ready to take off?
   

  

 Key Tasks
   

  

* You will take over the management of strategic, complex, international projects for the delivery of services, products and solutions for our customers.
* You are responsible for the success of this project in terms of time, costs, quality and customer satisfaction.
* You will lead and motivate project teams in a matrix organization.
* You ensure coordination, communication, and agreement with all relevant stakeholders.
* You are responsible for the management of subcontractors and partners.
* You support the continuous improvement of our service provision.
* You support the sales department in the preparation of offers and take responsibility for project planning.


**Key Qualifications**
* You can look back on several years of experience in the successful management of complex, international customer projects and preferably have a degree in business administration or technical studies.
* You are business fluent in German and English; additional foreign languages are an advantage.
* Ideally, you have experience in the aviation sector.
* You have experience in setting up and leading project organizations; a relevant project management certification (e.g. PMP) is an advantage.


 Our Values
   

  

 At Frequentis Comsoft, we are convinced that people deliver their best results when working in a company that suits them. Our employees all want to make a difference and to take responsibility for their work. We also firmly believe that as a company, we are stronger when people from diverse backgrounds actively contribute to the business. In addition to professional qualifications, we rely on good ideas, commitment and personal responsibility. We are always seeking bright minds, experts and lateral thinkers of every type, all of whom share an enthusiasm for making global air traffic even safer.
   

  

**Benefits**
 We offer attractive employee packages, where financial rewards are just as important as other benefits, including a 30\\-day annual leave allowance, sports and health programs, and JobRad bicycle leasing. The work\\-life balance of our employees is particularly important to us. We believe that private and family needs should be fully compatible with the daily work routine and that our employees should feel able to meet personal commitments even during standard working hours. This is another reason why flexitime and virtual working models come as standard at Frequentis Comsoft. In addition, our spacious and quiet offices, in which a maximum of four colleagues sit together, provide a calm and productive working environment. We are also guided by the principle of “healthy mind in a healthy body”. Our staff can train before or after work in our in\\-house gym or participate in sports courses. In addition, we regularly participate in various sports activities to promote team spirit and celebrate shared successes. A range of annual parties and events – for example, on our beautiful roof terrace – strengthen our sense of corporate community.
   

  

 FLEXIBLE, FAMILY FRIENDLY LIVELY, OPEN PERMANENT INTERNATIONAL COMPANY OFFICES WITH
   

  

 ROOFTOP FREE CORPORATE EASY ACCESS WORKING HOURS CULTURE EMPLOYMENT CONTRACTS CAREER OPORTUNITIES GYM MAX. 4 PERSONS TERRACE BEVERAGES EVENTS TO PUBLIC TRANSPORT

title: Project Manager
description:
Geek\\+ is a global technology company specialized in smart logistics. We apply advanced robotics and artificial intelligence technologies to create solutionsfor warehouse and factory operations.
 



  





 With the rise of e\\-commerce and the demand for a faster and more flexible movement of goods, warehouse and manufacturing operators are facing increasingly complex production and logistic challenges today. Speed, product diversification, same\\-day delivery, volume, safety… these concerns are impacting a wide range of industries, from apparel, retail, automotive, to even electronics, energy and pharmaceutical industries.
 



  





 Geek\\+ was founded to be the solution to these problems. We make logistics affordable, efficient, flexible, safe and agile. Our vision is to establish a fully automatedand intelligent supply chain globally.
 



  





**Responsibility** 



* Lead the complete project life cycle from kick off to handover
* Act as the main point of contact for ALL aspects during project delivery
* Align project scope, schedule and resource planning with sales and other functional teams
* Create and own project communication plans (internal \\& external)
* Motivate project team and facilitate on\\-time delivery of project team’s deliverables
* Work at least 50% onsite during installation and testing phases
* Plan project budget and manage project margin
* Actively manage project finance including invoicing, milestone payments, freight, travel expenses, change orders and contractor payments
* Control project scope and manage scope change process with client



  





**Required Skill and Capability** 



* Bachelor's degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Robotic Automation, IT, Mechanical or Electrical Engineering.
* At least 3 years of project management experience. Knowledge of warehouse management, logistics solutions, 3PL, automation, or related fields.
* Business fluency in English, other European language is a plus
* Excellent communication and presentation skill
* Proficiency in AutoCAD, WMS, or other IT infrastructure
* Accept business travel frequently across EMEA region (up to 60\\-80% of the time)



  





**Preferred qualifications, capabilities, and skills** 



* Have a sense of responsibility, work conscientiously and responsibly
* Outstanding resilience, capable of maintaining composure in fast\\-paced work environments
* Ability to prioritize multiple complex situations to deliver successful results
* Strong and effective skills in problem solving

title: Project Manager Tracker (m/w/d) - DE
description:
Über Uns
   

  

 Wir sind auf dem Boden geblieben, fühlen uns im Luftraum aber wie zu Hause. Als mittelständisches IT\\-Unternehmen mit Sitz in Karlsruhe entwickeln wir individuelle Lösungen für Flugsicherungsbehörden weltweit. Mit unseren Systemen, die in Flugkontrollzentren und Flughäfen in mehr als 80 Ländern im Einsatz sind, leisten wir einen wichtigen Beitrag zur internationalen Flugsicherheit. Frequentis Comsoft ist Teil der global sehr erfolgreichen Frequentis Firmengruppe mit Hauptsitz in Wien und zahlreichen Niederlassungen weltweit. Mehr Informationen finden Sie auf unserem Youtube Kanal.
   

  

 Sind auch Sie bereit zum Abflug?
   

  

 Aufgaben
   

  

* Sie übernehmen die Leitung strategischer, komplexer, internationaler Projekte zur Lieferung von Dienstleistungen, Produkten und Lösungen an unsere Kunden.
* Sie tragen die Verantwortung für den Erfolg dieser Projekte in den Aspekten Zeit, Kosten, Qualität und Kundenzufriedenheit.
* Sie führen und motivieren Projektteams in einer Matrix\\-Organisation.
* Sie gewährleisten die Koordination, Kommunikation und Abstimmung mit allen relevanten Stakeholdern.
* Sie verantworten das Management der Unterauftragnehmer und Partner.
* Sie unterstützen die kontinuierliche Verbesserung unserer Leistungserbringung.
* Sie unterstützen den Vertrieb bei der Angebotserstellung, übernehmen dabei Verantwortung für die Projektplanung.


 Qualifikationen
   

  

* Sie können auf mehrjährige Erfahrung in der erfolgreichen Leitung von komplexen, internationalen Kundenprojekten zurückblicken und verfügen idealerweise über ein abgeschlossenes betriebswirtschaftliches oder technisches Studium.
* Sie sprechen verhandlungssicher Deutsch und Englisch, zusätzliche Fremdsprachen sind von Vorteil.
* Optimalerweise verfügen Sie über Erfahrung im Bereich der Luftfahrt.
* Sie verfügen über Erfahrung im Aufbau und Führung von Projektorganisationen, eine zusätzliche Projektmanagement Zertifizierung (z.B. PMP) ist von Vorteil.


 Unsere Werte
   

  

 Wir liefern die besten Ergebnisse, wenn wir in einem Unternehmen arbeiten, das zu uns passt. Davon sind auch wir bei Frequentis Comsoft überzeugt. Zu uns passen MitarbeiterInnen, die etwas bewegen und Verantwortung übernehmen wollen. Außerdem glauben wir fest daran, dass wir als Unternehmen besser werden, wenn sich unterschiedliche Charaktere aktiv miteinbringen. Neben fachlicher Qualifikation setzen wir auf gute Ideen, Engagement und Eigenverantwortung. Wir suchen Spezilalisten, kluge Köpfe, Experten – unterschiedliche Typen, die alle eine Begeisterung teilen: Den weltweiten Flugverkehr noch sicherer machen.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Wir bieten unseren MitarbeiterInnen ein attraktives Gesamtpaket, bei dem monetäre Anerkennung genauso eine Rolle spielt wie andere Benefits (z.B. 30 Tage Urlaub, Sport\\- und Gesundheitsprogramme, JobRad). Die Work\\-Life\\-Balance unserer MitarbeiterInnen ist uns wichtig. Daher stellen wir sicher, dass private und familiäre Bedürfnisse gut mit dem Arbeitsalltag vereinbar sind. Das ist auch der Grund, warum flexible Arbeitszeitmodelle und eine moderne Arbeitsumgebung für uns selbstverständlich sind. Zusätzlich bieten unsere Büros, in denen maximal vier Kollegen zusammensitzen, die Möglichkeit, sich in Ruhe seinen Aufgaben zu widmen. Sportbegeisterte KollegInnen kommen bei uns ebenfalls auf ihre Kosten. Unsere MitarbeiterInnen können vor oder nach der Arbeit im hauseigenen Fitness\\-Studio trainieren und sich an Sportkursen beteiligen. Daneben nehmen wir regelmäßig an verschiedenen Sportaktionen teil, bei denen der Teamgeist gefördert und gemeinsame Erfolge gefeiert werden. Das Zusammengehörigkeitsgefühl möchten wir auch durch eine Reihe jährlich wiederkehrender Feste stärken. Diese werden durch spontane Events – z.B. auf unserer schönen Dachterrasse \\- ergänzt.
   

  

 FLEXIBLE, FAMILIENFREUNDLICHE LEBENDIGE; OFFENE UNBEFRISTETE INTERNATIONALE FIRMENEIGENES MAX. 4er
   

  

 DACHTERASSE FREIE FIRMENEVENTS SEHR GUTE ARBEITSZEITEN DU\\-KULTUR ARBEITSVERTRÄGE KARRIEREMÖGLICHKEITEN FITNESSSTUDIO BÜROS GETRÄNKE ÖFFENTLICHE ANBINDUNG

title: Project Manager (w/m/d)
description:
Strike Missiles
   

  

 Als führendes deutsches System­­haus für Luft­ver­tei­digung, Lenk­flug­körper und Laser­techno­logie entwickeln wir heute die Lösungen gegen die Bedrohungen von morgen und bringen Spitzentechnologie zur Serienreife. Unsere Systeme über­zeugen in den Grenzbereichen der Physik durch hohe Präzision, sichern militärische Überlegenheit und garantieren damit politische Handlungsfähigkeit.  mehr weniger

title: Project Manager (PMO) (m/w/d)
description:
Warum Wir?
   

  

 Bei uns erwarten Dich weltweit verteilte, internationale Teams, flache Hierarchien und eine offene Unternehmenskultur, die zum Mitgestalten einlädt. Mobiles Arbeiten und flexible Arbeitszeiten gehören für uns zum Alltag. Möchtest Du Teil eines innovativen Unternehmens werden, dessen Lösung den Arbeitsalltag in unterschiedlichsten Branchen digitalisiert? Dann werde Teil unseres Teams!
   

  

 Das erwartet Dich
   

  

 Als Project Manager bei DocuWare steuerst du unternehmensweit relevante Projekte von der Idee bis zur erfolgreichen Umsetzung. Dabei kombinierst du exzellentes Projektmanagement mit inhaltlicher Tiefe und sorgst so für sichtbaren Impact.
   

  

 Zu Deinen Aufgaben gehören:
   

  

* Du führst und steuerst strategische und unternehmensweite Projekte von der Initiierung bis zur erfolgreichen Implementierung.
* Du entwickelst ganzheitliche Projektpläne inklusive Scope, Zeitplan, Ressourcen, Budget und Risikobewertung.
* Du koordinierst Projektteams sowie externe Partner und stellst eine klare, regelmäßige Kommunikation über alle Funktionen hinweg sicher.
* Du überwachst den Projektfortschritt, identifizierst proaktiv Risiken und leitest wirksame Gegenmaßnahmen ein
* Du bereitest Statusberichte und Management\\-Präsentationen auf und präsentierst diese für C\\-Level und weitere Stakeholder.
* Du stellst die Ausrichtung der Projekte auf die Unternehmensstrategie sicher und übersetzt strategische Ziele in konkrete Maßnahmen.
* Du unterstützt das Management durch strukturierte Analysen, belastbare Entscheidungsgrundlagen und klare Empfehlungen.
* Du identifizierst Optimierungspotenziale in Prozessen und verankerst Change\\-Management\\-Initiativen.


 Das bringst Du mit
   

  

* Du hast ein abgeschlossenes Studium, vorzugsweise in Betriebswirtschaftlehre, Finance, oder verwandtem Bereich und bist sehr erfahren im Projekt Management.
* Du verfügst über fundierte Erfahrung in der erfolgreichen Steuerung komplexer Projekte in einem Unternehmensumfeld oder in der Beratung.
* Du hast ein stark ausgeprägtes digitales Verständnis und eine hohe Affinität für Software Tools.
* Du arbeitest strukturiert, analytisch und lösungsorientiert und priorisierst mehrere Aufgaben parallel, erste Change Management Erfahrung ist ein Plus.
* Du kommunizierst sicher in Deutsch und Englisch und agierst souverän auf allen Ebenen – bis hin zum Executive Leadership.


 Darauf kannst Du Dich freuen
   

  

 Es gibt viele gute Gründe, bei DocuWare einzusteigen – unsere Unternehmenskultur ist nur einer davon. Als Teil des DocuWare\\-Teams profitierst du von zahlreichen Vorteilen:
   

  

* **Weltweit verteilte, internationale Teams** 
 : Du triffst uns in Germering, New York, Sofia oder vielen anderen Locations
 **.**
* **Flexibler Arbeitsort und Arbeitszeit** 
 : Du arbeitest mobil oder in unserem modernen und gut ausgestattetem Büro – dabei teilst Du Dir deine Arbeitszeit flexibel ein.
* **Individuelle Förderung:** 
 Nach einer intensiven Einarbeitung bekommst Du regelmäßig auf Dich zugeschnittene Weiterbildungen (u.a. Kongresse, interne Teambuilding Maßnahmen).
* **Wohl verdiente Erholung:** 
 Neben 35 Urlaubstagen im Jahr bieten wir Dir ein breites Sport\\- und Massageangebot, Kicker\\-Tisch und einen entspannenden Lounge\\-Bereich.
* **Mentale Gesundheit im Fokus:** 
 Über unser Employee Assistance Program erhältst Du jederzeit kostenfreien und vertraulichen Zugang zu Angeboten und Unterstützung für Dein Wohlbefinden und Stressmanagement.
* **Gesunde Ernährung:** 
 Zusammen genießen wir Fairtrade Kaffee mit Bio\\-Milch oder HaferDrink, Snacks und frisches Obst – alles kostenlos – sowie bezuschussten Lunch aus dem Foodji\\-Kühlschrank.
* **Gratis\\-Mittagessen am Dienstag:** 
 Jeden Dienstag erwartet Dich ein kostenloses, abwechslungsreiches Mittagessen.

 Komm ins Büro mit dem geleasten E\\-Bike (Jobrad), per S\\-Bahn oder über die Autobahnen A96/A99 (Dein E\\-Auto kannst Du vor Ort kostenlos laden).
* **Team\\-Spirit** 
 : Regelmäßige Events für Mitarbeitende \\- virtuell oder vor Ort sorgen für Zusammenhalt.
* **Nachhaltigkeit und soziales Engagement:** 
 DocuWare steht für papierloses Arbeiten und unterstützt ehrenamtliche Organisationen und lokale Sportvereine.
* **Du sorgst vor \\& wir unterstützen Dich dabei:** 
 DocuWare bezuschusst Deine betriebliche Altersvorsorge.
* **Ein stabiler Arbeitsplatz:** 
 In unserem langjährig bestehenden und stetig wachsenden Unternehmen erhältst Du eine unbefristete Festanstellung.
* **Einzigartige Vorteile:**

title: Senior Project Manager (m/f/d)

As an experienced project manager, you will take on the technical and commercial overall responsibility for national and international projects in the biopharma and life sciences sector. These typically include the planning, construction, or renovation of complex production facilities, complete manufacturing plants, or laboratory buildings.You will actively accompany and shape all project phases – from the feasibility study (Feasibility) through Concept Design (CD) and Basic Design (BD) to Detailed Design (DD), implementation, commissioning, and qualification. As a general planner, you will integrate all internal departments and coordinate interdisciplinary planning teams.

* Management of planning, implementation and finalization of projects in the biopharma and life science industry
* Active participation in shaping the early project phases (Feasibility, Concept Design, Basic Design) with technical and economic expertise
* Ownership of cost, time and quality targets of the project

* Internal and external project reporting
* Assembly and management Exyte’s project team during the planning and execution phase
* Management and coordination of external partners and suppliers
* Risk Management for the project
* Participation in contract award negotiations with suppliers and sub\\-contractors


**Show Your Expertise**
* Completed degree in industrial engineering, civil engineering, architecture, building services engineering or clean room technology
* Several years of professional experience in the planning and implementation of EPC investment projects, ideally within the Biopharma
* Fluent German and English language skills mandatory
* Ability and willingness to travel and stay on site
* Independent and service\\-oriented way of working and good communication skills


**Contact**
 You want to be part of the Exyte team? We look forward to receiving your application!
   

  

 For further questions and information, please do not hesitate to contact Lisa Kussmaul via E\\-Mail at lisamarie.kussmaul@exyte.net.

title: Project Manager – Network Planning
description:
**Project Manager (m/f/d) – Network Planning
   

  

 📍 Paderborn, North Rhine\\-Westphalia, Germany
   

 🏡 Hybrid / Remote
   

 🕒 Full\\-Time
   

 💰 €63,000 – €80,000
   

 🗣 German C1 Required
   

  

 About the Role**
 We are looking for a proactive Project Manager – Network Planning to support the successful grid connection and commissioning of wind energy projects. This role combines technical coordination, stakeholder management, and project execution within the renewable energy sector.
   

  

 You will work closely with grid operators, authorities, landowners, and internal teams to ensure projects are delivered efficiently, compliantly, and on schedule.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 • Plan and coordinate grid connection activities for wind energy projects
   

 • Oversee projects from grid integration through commissioning
   

 • Coordinate with grid operators, authorities, and external partners
   

 • Manage tenders for medium\\-voltage components and cable route construction services
   

 • Evaluate technical bids and support vendor selection
   

 • Coordinate electrical certification processes and ensure compliance
   

 • Help optimize internal project workflows and operational efficiency
   

  

**Requirements**
 • Bachelor’s degree in Renewable Energy, Engineering, Environmental Science, or related field
   

 • 3\\+ years of relevant professional experience
   

 • Experience in wind energy or related technical environments preferred
   

 • Strong organizational and communication skills
   

 • Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously
   

 • Proficiency in MS Office, especially Excel and PowerPoint
   

 • Valid Class B driver’s license
   

 • German language proficiency at C1 level required
   

  

**What’s Offered**
 • Flexible hybrid/remote work environment
   

 • 30 vacation days
